lesson.subtitle: Aula 17 -- At the Airport -- Part 2
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gabriela Paulucci | Aula 17 -- At the Airport -- Part 2

listenings.text: Welcome to London. This is an arrival announcement for all passengers. Please go to passport control now. Have your passport ready for the immigration officer. The officer asks where you are going and how long you are staying. After passport control, go to the green sign for arrivals. Welcome, and enjoy your stay.

Hi, I am Gabriela. My flight lands in London, and now I am at passport control. I am a little nervous, but I am ready. The officer looks at my passport and asks me some questions. I say I am here on vacation, and I am staying for one week. I say I am staying at a hotel. The officer says welcome to London. I am very happy. Now I go to arrivals.

extra_audio.text: First, Gabriela's flight lands in London and she walks to passport control. Then she gives her passport to the immigration officer. The officer asks where she is going and how long she is staying. After that, Gabriela answers that she is here on vacation for one week. Finally, the officer says welcome, and she goes to arrivals.
